title: [Bounty: 10 RTC] Add test suite for bounty-concierge CLI
body_snippet: ## Bounty: 10 RTC  **Target repo**: [Scottcjn/bounty-concierge](https://github.com/Scottcjn/bounty-concierge)  ### Description Add a pytest test suite covering the core concierge modules: - `test_faq_engine.py` — FAQ matching returns correct answers - `test_bounty_index.py` — RTC parsing from issue titles - `test_wallet_helper.py` — Wallet name validation  ### Acceptance Criteria - [ ] 3+ test files in `tests/` directory - [ ] All tests pass with `pytest tests/ -v` - [ ] Covers FAQ matching, RTC amount parsing, wallet name validation - [ ] No external API calls in tests (mock where needed)  ### Wallet Include your RTC wallet ID when claiming.
